response.reasoning: The role requires 15 years of experience with director-level IC scope, deep AI expertise, cloud platform strategy, and demonstrated AI products/platforms. The candidate has roughly 16 years of software development experience (since 2009), meeting the tenure bar. However, the experience is predominantly full-stack web/mobile/embedded development at IC level, not Principal/Director-level strategic leadership. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work at re:cinq (since April 2025) — under a year, and at contributor level rather than leading AI product strategy. Cloud experience exists (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) but isn't a strategic focus. No advanced degree in AI, no recognized AI products, no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud product futures. The profile is a strong senior engineer, not a Principal/Director IC in AI strategy.
strengths: ~16 years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder of GISCollective — shows entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
concerns: No Principal/Staff-level strategic leadership or director-scope influence demonstrated
AI/ML expertise is shallow and very recent (<1 year), with no recognized AI products
No advanced degree and no evidence of advising strategic customers on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: Meets 15-year tenure with broad engineering breadth

response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior engineer with the requisite tenure and entrepreneurial streak, but the role explicitly targets a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products at scale. The résumé shows only nascent AI-agent work and no track record of shaping cloud/AI strategy or advising strategic customers, which is the core of this position.
